Politics.headline: Trump lashes out at Pope Leo again ahead of Rubio trip to Rome
Politics.detail: The criticism of the pontiff's stance on Iran highlighted what Vatican officials have described as an unprecedented low in relations with the United States.

Politics.headline: Supreme Court restores access to abortion pill by mail for now
Politics.detail: The Supreme Court has temporarily restored access to abortion pills by mail.

Politics.headline: Supreme Court clears path for Louisiana to redraw map in redistricting fight
Politics.detail: The Supreme Court has cleared the path for Louisiana to redraw its map in a redistricting fight.

Politics.headline: Canada commits $270M to Ukraine as Carney addresses European summit in Armenia
Politics.detail: Canada has committed $270M to Ukraine as Carney addresses the European summit in Armenia.

Politics.headline: Sudanese asylum seekers challenge Home Office rule changes for refugees
Politics.detail: Sudanese asylum seekers are challenging Home Office rule changes for refugees.

Finance & Economy.headline: Global finance watchdog warns over private credit industry fuelling AI boom
Finance & Economy.detail: The global finance watchdog has issued a warning regarding the private credit industry potentially fueling the boom in Artificial Intelligence (AI). This highlights concerns about the financial stability and risks associated with the rapid growth of AI and its reliance on private credit.

Finance & Economy.headline: Chevron CEO says economies 'are going to have to slow' as Strait of Hormuz closure disrupts oil supply.
Finance & Economy.detail: The CEO of Chevron has warned that economies will likely need to slow down as the closure of the Strait of Hormuz is causing disruptions in the oil supply, potentially impacting global economic activity.

Finance & Economy.headline: Stocks gain as Middle East tensions cool
Finance & Economy.detail: U.S. equity markets closed higher on Tuesday, while oil prices moved lower, as a lack of further escalation in tensions with Iran supported investor sentiment. The move followed renewed military action on Monday that raised concerns about the durability of the fragile ceasefire between the U.S. and Iran.

Finance & Economy.headline: US plans to hike tariffs on EU cars to 25% will hit luxury market the most
Finance & Economy.detail: The US is planning to increase tariffs on cars imported from the EU to 25% because the EU has not complied with the trade deal from last year, which set tariffs at 15%; the increase will mostly impact the luxury car market.

Finance & Economy.headline: U.S. International Trade in Goods and Services, March 2026
Finance & Economy.detail: The U.S. monthly international trade deficit increased in March 2026 according to the U.S. Bureau of Economic Analysis and the U.S. Census Bureau, with the deficit increasing from $57.8 billion in February to $60.3 billion in March as imports increased more than exports.

Technology.headline: Government to launch AI pilot program to boost efficiency and encourage tech's adoption
Technology.detail: The government is planning to launch a large-scale pilot program for Gennai, a generative artificial intelligence platform developed for internal use by civil servants, to boost efficiency in administrative work.

Technology.headline: Tech Launches Today (May 6, 2026): CMF Watch 3 Pro, Dreame summer sale, Cashify Select, and more
Technology.detail: New gadgets, consumer tech, and AI-led applications are launching today, including the CMF Watch 3 Pro and Dreame Technology's summer sale offers on smart home appliances.

Technology.headline: Ireland strengthens equitable access to assistive technology, new WHO assessment shows
Technology.detail: Ireland has made advancements in providing equitable access to assistive technology like wheelchairs and hearing aids, according to a joint assessment by the Government of Ireland and WHO/Europe.

Technology.headline: AI boom drives a rally in buying of tech shares, pushing South Korea's Kospi to a record
Technology.detail: South Korea's Kospi soared nearly 7% to a fresh record as Samsung Electronics' stock jumped nearly 13% due to expectations of strong growth in artificial intelligence.

Technology.headline: Your Xbox Won't Get Microsoft Copilot AI Features After All
Technology.detail: Microsoft's new Xbox chief is winding down Gaming Copilot on mobile and canceling its console launch.

Science.headline: Penn Researchers Develop Smarter AI Method for Solving Inverse Equations
Science.detail: Researchers have developed a smarter AI method for solving notoriously difficult inverse equations, which help scientists uncover hidden causes behind observable effects, by introducing “mollifier layers” that smooth noisy data.

Science.headline: Forgotten Fossil in Garden Wall Identified as Remarkable Prehistoric Discovery
Science.detail: A forgotten fossil hidden inside a garden wall has turned out to be one of Australia's most remarkable prehistoric discoveries; scientists have now identified the 240-million-year-old amphibian.

Science.headline: New Study Finds Genetic Key to Vitamin D's Role in Diabetes Prevention
Science.detail: A new study has discovered a genetic component that explains how Vitamin D aids in the prevention of diabetes.

Science.headline: Physicists Propose Strange Experiment Where Time Goes Quantum
Science.detail: Cutting-edge atomic clocks may soon reveal a strange possibility: time itself behaving like a quantum entity.

Science.headline: Medieval jaw reveals Scotland's first known dental bridge made from 20-carat gold
Science.detail: A recently analyzed medieval jawbone revealed that Scotland's first known dental bridge was crafted using 20-carat gold.

Health.headline: WHO and the Stop TB Partnership publish a TB near point-of-care and swab-based testing toolkit
Health.detail: To support WHO member countries in their efforts to implement new policy recommendations for TB diagnostic testing, WHO and the Stop TB Partnership have published the TB near point-of-care and swab-based testing toolkit (NPOC/swab toolkit) designed to support implementation of TB near point-of-care nucleic acid amplification tests (NPOC-NAATs) for swabs of sputum and tongue swabs to diagnose tuberculosis (TB) with and without drug resistance.

Health.headline: 3 patients evacuated from cruise ship with hantavirus outbreak, new case confirmed in Switzerland
Health.detail: A cruise ship is stuck off the coast of Cape Verde due to a hantavirus outbreak, with three deaths reported. Health authorities in South Africa and Switzerland identified a strain of the virus that can be transmitted between humans in rare cases.

Health.headline: Colon Cancer Breakthrough Keeps Patients Cancer-free for Nearly 3 Years
Health.detail: A short burst of immunotherapy before surgery is delivering surprisingly powerful results for a specific type of colorectal cancer. Patients in a UK-led trial who received just nine weeks of pembrolizumab prior to surgery have remained cancer-free.

Health.headline: Early Climate Health Investments Generate 68-Fold Gains in Low- and Middle-Income Countries
Health.detail: New research reveals that every $1 invested in preparing for climate-caused health risks can yield up to $68 in benefits for communities in Africa, Asia, Latin America and the Caribbean, and the Middle East. The research shows how tools and services like early warning systems and disease surveillance significantly reduce deaths and illness, helping more communities in low- and middle-income countries become more resilient.

Health.headline: Trump's Drug Strategy Aims To Bolster Addiction Services — Despite Gutting of Government Support
Health.detail: The White House's strategy for tackling the drug and addiction crisis, released this week, sets lofty public health goals but highlights deep inconsistencies with the administration's own funding cuts and other policies. It may soon get easier for millions of people with Medicare to get discounted GLP-1 drugs for weight loss.

Sports.headline: Dunker and Waters strike winning ASBK blows at the Bend
Sports.detail: Cameron Dunker and Josh Walters each secured race wins during round three of the 2026 Australian Superbike Championship at The Bend Motorsport Park.

Sports.headline: Eagles' Klaus wins bronze medal at IIHF U18 Men's World Hockey Championship
Sports.detail: Forward Adam Klaus of the Cape Breton Eagles won a bronze medal with Czechia at the IIHF U18 Men's World Championship, defeating Latvia 4-1.

Sports.headline: LIV Golf 2026, PGA Tour: Cameron Smith responds to funding crisis and retirement rumours
Sports.detail: Cameron Smith dismissed retirement rumors and stated that LIV Adelaide will proceed next year, despite the Saudi Public Investment Fund ending its funding of the league at the end of this season; Smith also intends to compete for another major.

Sports.headline: London Marathon sets record after 1.8% of UK adult population applies for 2027 race
Sports.detail: The London Marathon has set a new record with a large number of applications for the 2027 race.

Sports.headline: Big 12 Strikes Private Capital Deal
Sports.detail: The Big 12 is the first major college sports conference to strike a league-wide private capital deal, partnering with RedBird Capital Partners in a five-year agreement designed to grow revenue.

Entertainment.headline: Met Gala 2026: Michael and The Devil Wears Prada 2 Casts TAKE OVER!
Entertainment.detail: The Met Gala 2026 saw a strong presence from the cast of 'The Devil Wears Prada 2' and a new biopic about Michael Jackson, making a splash at the prestigious fashion event.

Entertainment.headline: Sharon Cuneta supportive of Frankie Pangilinan's rumored romance
Entertainment.detail: Sharon Cuneta has shown support for her daughter, Frankie Pangilinan, amid rumors of a new romance, according to recent reports.

Entertainment.headline: Blake Lively & Justin Baldoni's 'It Ends With Us' Lawsuit Settlement Details
Entertainment.detail: Blake Lively and Justin Baldoni have settled their legal battle related to 'It Ends With Us' shortly before it was set to go to trial, releasing a joint statement about the settlement.

Entertainment.headline: Spandau Ballet's Ross Davidson jailed for 14 years after being found guilty of rape
Entertainment.detail: Ross Davidson, from the band Spandau Ballet, has been sentenced to 14 years in jail after being convicted of rape.

Entertainment.headline: Jessica Sanchez, Morissette showcase powerful vocals in 'Stronger than Before'
Entertainment.detail: Jessica Sanchez and Morissette have teamed up to deliver a powerful vocal performance in their new collaboration, 'Stronger than Before'.

Crime & Justice.headline: Correspondents' dinner suspect faces new charge of assaulting federal officer
Crime & Justice.detail: Revised indictment alleges Cole Allen, accused of targeting Trump, assaulted federal officer with deadly weapon.

Crime & Justice.headline: Guns and lies. California 'failing victims' of violent crime as financial support plummets
Crime & Justice.detail: Analysis finds victims' compensation program is awarding less money to fewer people, although budget has increased.

Crime & Justice.headline: Antisemitic graffiti found across NYC
Crime & Justice.detail: An investigation is underway in New York City after multiple locations were vandalized with antisemitic graffiti.

Crime & Justice.headline: Manhunt on for retired special forces soldier accused of shooting wife
Crime & Justice.detail: Authorities say Craig Berry, a retired special forces soldier, shot his wife and then fled into the woods in northern Tennessee.

Crime & Justice.headline: Maryland Resident Pleads Guilty to Distribution of Child Pornography
Crime & Justice.detail: A Maryland resident has pleaded guilty to distributing child pornography.

Education.headline: Dharmendra Pradhan Releases SMC Guidelines 2026 To Strengthen School Governance And Education Quality
Education.detail: Union Education Minister Dharmendra Pradhan released the School Management Committee (SMC) Guidelines 2026 aimed at strengthening school governance and improving the quality of education in India.

Education.headline: Centre To Send Letters For PM SHRI Rollout In Bengal, Tamil Nadu
Education.detail: The central government is set to send letters to West Bengal and Tamil Nadu urging them to sign a Memorandum of Understanding (MoU) for the PM SHRI (PM Schools for Rising India) scheme, which aims to upgrade schools across the country.

Education.headline: Jharkhand Class 12 Result 2026 Declared: Arts Stream Leads With Highest Pass Percentage
Education.detail: The Jharkhand Academic Council (JAC) has declared the Class 12 results for 2026, with the arts stream achieving the highest pass percentage among all streams.

Education.headline: Mumbai University UG Registration 2026 Begins; Check Direct Link And Key Dates Here
Education.detail: The University of Mumbai has commenced the registration process for undergraduate (UG) programs for the academic year 2026, and students can find the direct link and important dates on the university's website.

Education.headline: TNEA 2026 process kicks off with release of tentative schedule
Education.detail: The Tamil Nadu Engineering Admissions (TNEA) 2026 process has officially begun with the release of the tentative schedule for admissions.

Lifestyle.headline: Met Gala 2026 live: stars walk the carpet on fashion's biggest night – as it happened
Lifestyle.detail: The biggest names in fashion and entertainment gather for the annual Met Gala, showcasing extravagant and innovative designs.

Lifestyle.headline: Sali Hughes on beauty: the best tinted sunscreens deliver SPF, moisture and a spring glow all in one
Lifestyle.detail: Beauty expert Sali Hughes recommends the best tinted sunscreens that provide SPF protection, hydration, and a radiant complexion for spring.

Lifestyle.headline: Inside The 'Twin Town' In Kerala Where 1 In Every 5 People Is A Twin
Lifestyle.detail: A unique phenomenon in Kerala, India, has led to a village where a remarkably high proportion of the population consists of twins.

Lifestyle.headline: Fans adopt Esplanade bench in Singapore to honour late Chinese actor Yu Menglong
Lifestyle.detail: Devoted fans in Singapore have adopted a bench at the Esplanade Theatres on the Bay to commemorate the late Chinese actor Yu Menglong, who passed away unexpectedly last September.

Lifestyle.headline: How to save asparagus trimmings from the food-waste bin – recipe
Lifestyle.detail: A recipe for utilizing asparagus trimmings to reduce food waste, promoting sustainable cooking practices.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Report cards are sending parents the wrong signals
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Many students in the U.S. aren't proficient in reading or math, but report cards often show inflated grades, leading parents to believe their children are performing well when test scores indicate otherwise, which can delay necessary academic support.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: The hill I will die on: Heavy, awkward and incredibly expensive – we don't need hardback books
Opinion/Editorial.detail: An opinion piece arguing against the need for hardback books, citing their weight, awkwardness, and expense.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Soldiers Not Pawns
Opinion/Editorial.detail: This editorial discusses the safety and security of peacekeepers in Southern Lebanon, the deepening defense relationship between Ireland and France, and a stronger defense link with Britain, in light of the deteriorating international security situation in the Middle East.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: EDITORIAL: Bad press — and a bad brand — for Colorado
Opinion/Editorial.detail: Colorado is experiencing a high rate of net business loss due to burdensome regulations, causing companies to leave, which is resulting in job losses and impacting the state's long-term prosperity and economic competitiveness.

Opinion/Editorial.headline: Opinion: Colorado should make the most of a new federal education tax credit
Opinion/Editorial.detail: A new federal tax credit could bring substantial philanthropic dollars into Colorado education without drawing from the state’s general fund, by allowing taxpayers to receive a federal tax credit for contributions to scholarship-granting organizations.

World.headline: U.S. and Iran closing in on one-page memo to end war, officials say
World.detail: The White House believes it's getting close to an agreement with Iran on a one-page memorandum of understanding to end the war and set a framework for more detailed nuclear negotiations; the U.S. expects Iranian responses on several key points in the next 48 hours. Nothing has been agreed yet, but sources say this was the closest the parties had been to an agreement since the war began.

World.headline: Explosion at fireworks factory in China kills at least 26
World.detail: An explosion at a fireworks factory in China has killed at least 26 people. The incident underscores the safety risks associated with the production of fireworks.

World.headline: Hantavirus: Possible human transmission in cruise ship outbreak, WHO says
World.detail: The World Health Organization (WHO) has reported a possible case of human-to-human transmission of hantavirus on a cruise ship, where an outbreak has already resulted in multiple deaths. Three passengers were evacuated from the vessel, and human-to-human transmission has been confirmed in Switzerland and South Africa.

World.headline: Russia snubs Ukraine's unilateral ceasefire, firing dozens of drones
World.detail: Despite Russia declaring a unilateral ceasefire in Ukraine to mark Victory Day, Russia snubs Ukraine's unilateral ceasefire, firing dozens of drones. Zelenskyy slams Russia's 'utter cynicism' as strikes kill 5 in Ukraine before announced ceasefire.

World.headline: Israel must release Gaza-bound flotilla activists
World.detail: The UN Human Rights Office calls for the immediate and unconditional release of Global Sumud Flotilla members Saif Abukeshek and Thiago de Avila, who were detained in international waters and brought to Israel where they continue to be held without charge. The office states that showing solidarity and attempting to bring humanitarian aid to the Palestinian population in Gaza is not a crime.

Zimbabwe.headline: Byo residents call for end to water shedding
Zimbabwe.detail: Bulawayo residents are demanding an end to water shedding, citing the inconvenience and potential health risks associated with inconsistent water supply.

Zimbabwe.headline: ZAPU claims constitutional changes could curb freedoms
Zimbabwe.detail: The ZAPU party asserts that proposed constitutional amendments could potentially restrict freedoms and undermine democratic principles in Zimbabwe.

Zimbabwe.headline: After Court Defeat, Mnangagwa Orders Publication Of State Land Inquiry Report
Zimbabwe.detail: Following a court defeat, President Mnangagwa has directed the publication of the State Land Inquiry Report.

Zimbabwe.headline: Harare's Water Source At Risk As MPs Allocated Stands On Monavale Wetland
Zimbabwe.detail: Harare's primary water source is in danger due to the allocation of parliamentary stands on the Monavale Wetland.

Zimbabwe.headline: Food is back — but can Zimbabweans afford it?
Zimbabwe.detail: While food supplies have improved, concerns remain about the affordability of food for many Zimbabweans.
